## New Website Content

### WRI: Energy Communities in Colombia
- Water-Energy-Food Nexus framework for Colombia's Energy Communities Strategy
- Climate adaptation and mitigation integration at community level
- Relevant for actuarial models assessing systemic climate risk at community level
- Source: https://www.wri.org/research/energy-communities-model-strengthen-climate-resilience-colombia | Apr 10, 2026

## New Research

### NZ Actuaries Institute: Climate Disclosures Working Group
- Guidance on identifying and quantifying anticipated financial impacts of climate-related risks
- Covers direct/indirect impacts, chronic/acute events, correlated risk combinations
- Framework for mapping climate events to financial metrics
- Source: https://actuaries.org.nz | Apr 2026

### Swiss Re Institute: 2025 Nat-Cat Review
- US$107bn insured nat cat losses in 2025; 92% from secondary perils
- 2026 projection: US$148bn baseline, up to US$320bn peak
- Secondary perils to drive >65% of avg annual losses by 2030

### WRI Colombia Working Paper (same as website item above)
